description_long: This is a plush toy modeled after the iconic cartoon character Mickey Mouse, featuring a black head and body, large round ears, and a white face with exaggerated eyes and a wide, toothy grin. The toy is dressed in bright red shorts with two white buttons, large yellow shoes, and white gloves, all of which are signature elements of the character's design. The surface appears soft and slightly matte, typical of stuffed toys, with visible seams and rounded contours. The toy's arms are extended outward, and its legs are straight, giving it a welcoming and playful appearance. The facial features are stylized, with black oval eyes, a small black nose, and a smiling mouth with visible teeth. The overall construction suggests a lightweight, squeezable form, likely filled with synthetic stuffing.
description: A soft, plush Mickey Mouse toy with red shorts, yellow shoes, white gloves, and a wide, stylized grin. The toy has a classic cartoon appearance with large round ears and a soft, squeezable body.
description_view_0: Front view showing Mickey Mouse's face, red shorts, yellow shoes, and outstretched arms.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the head, nose, and the side of the shoes and gloves.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head, body, and shorts, with both ears and shoes visible.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile of the face, nose, and the side of the gloves and shoes.
attribute_facial_expression: The facial expression is a wide, toothy grin with large, open eyes and a small, round nose, giving a cheerful and slightly exaggerated look.
attribute_pose_or_posture: Standing upright with both arms extended outward and legs straight.
